name: Mitsurugi Tempest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>八雲断</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヤクモタツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巳剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミツルギ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you have a "Mitsurugi" Ritual Spell in your GY: Tribute 3 monsters whose original names are "Ame no Murakumo no Mitsurugi", "Futsu no Mitama no Mitsurugi", and "Ame no Habakiri no Mitsurugi"; make your opponent banish exactly 8 cards from their hand, Extra Deck, field, and/or GY. You can only activate 1 "Mitsurugi Tempest" per turn.
eff: If you have a "Mitsurugi" Ritual Spell in your GY: Tribute 3 monsters whose original names are "Ame no Murakumo no Mitsurugi", "Futsu no Mitama no Mitsurugi", and "Ame no Habakiri no Mitsurugi"; make your opponent banish exactly 8 cards from their hand, Extra Deck, field, and/or GY. You can only activate 1 "Mitsurugi Tempest" per turn.

banished: Makes the opponent banish from the hand
Makes the opponent banish from the Extra Deck
Makes the opponent banish from the field
Makes the opponent banish from the Graveyard
